svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="industrial-robot-copilot" name="Solution Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="2062" dy="1412" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=26;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Industrial Robot Copilot - Multimodal Safety and Navigation Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="1060" x="270" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dataGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f1ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" value="Multimodal Inputs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="340" width="250" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rgb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="RGB Camera Frames
05_rgb/calibrated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="190" x="90" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="thermal" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Thermal Frames
06_thermal/calibrated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="190" x="90" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="radar" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Radar Point Cloud / CSV
motion + velocity" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="190" x="90" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="meta" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Metadata + Labels
environment + distance" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="190" x="90" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pipelineGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;align=center;verticalAlign=top;" value="Perception + Reasoning Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="780" x="370" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loader" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Frame Loader
src/loader.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="410" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fusion" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Sensor Fusion
RGB + Thermal + Radar" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="640" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="world" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="World State
human, distance, motion, tags" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="900" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="locator" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Object Localization
labels / YOLO / GroundingDINO / locate-anything.cpp" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="250" x="410" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vlm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="VLM Scene Understanding
Qwen-VL via vLLM
floor region + path hints + scene JSON" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="250" x="720" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scene" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Scene Model
objects, hazards, navigation, path source" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="410" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reasoner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Risk Reasoner
LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH / CRITICAL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="690" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="planner" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Robot Planner
action, mode, speed cap, desired path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="950" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="copilot" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Copilot Explanation
human-readable decision summary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="690" y="545" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cacheGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff7e6;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" value="Streaming Cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="300" x="1210" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cacheScript" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="scripts/cache_qwen_outputs.py
precomputes Qwen + locator + plan outputs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="240" x="1240" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cacheFile" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3d;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="cache/qwen_stream.json
located_objects + navigation + floor/path sources" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="200" x="1260" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="uiGroup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf7ea;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;verticalAlign=top;" value="User Interface + Outputs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="780" x="370" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gradio" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Gradio Dashboard
app.py" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="410" y="775" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stream" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Top Cached Stream
RGB/Thermal + cached boxes + path + floor overlay" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="215" x="645" y="750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pane" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Lower Inspection Pane
live selected frame pipeline output" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="215" x="895" y="750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="explain" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Explainable Outputs
risk, action, speed, path/floor source, boxes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="650" y="900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stakeholders" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Stakeholders
operators, safety managers, robotics engineers, demo evaluators" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="300" x="1210" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="rgb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=2;" target="loader"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="350" y="197" /> <mxPoint x="350" y="205" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="thermal" rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 740px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 26px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
